title: Stretcherz Play Case With 5 Mini Stretch Toys for Kids | Stretchy Fidget Toy Set in Dino or Skull Case | Sensory Stress Relief Toy | Collectible Figures for Boys & Girls Ages 3+
features: FUN STRETCH TOYS FOR KIDS AND COLLECTORS – The Stretcherz Play Case comes with 5 mini stretchy characters that can stretch up to 3x their original size! Ideal for sensory play, fidget fun, and imaginative adventures, these durable stretch toys help keep kids entertained while improving focus and motor skills. Perfect for children aged 3+ who love tactile, hands-on fun.

CHOOSE YOUR PLAY CASE STYLE – DINO OR SKULL – Each set includes a bold and colourful storage case in your choice of a dinosaur or skull design. These fun and fierce collectible cases make tidying up exciting and double as imaginative play backdrops. Ideal for themed play and easy storage at home or on the go, the Stretcherz case is as cool as the toys inside!

STRESS RELIEF & SENSORY BENEFITS – Whether your child needs help with focus, stress relief, or sensory processing, the Stretcherz Play Case offers a fun and safe way to decompress. These stretch toys are great for kids with ADHD, autism, or anxiety, offering a calming outlet through tactile stimulation and repetitive motion that helps reduce stress and tension.

PERFECT SIZE FOR LITTLE HANDS – Designed with kids in mind, the mini Stretcherz figures are lightweight, squishy, and easy to stretch, twist, and squish. The case itself measures H25cm x W7cm x D19cm, making it great for portable play. Whether it's travel, playdates, or quiet time at home, this stretch toy set is always ready to go!

GREAT GIFT FOR BOYS AND GIRLS AGED 3+ – Looking for a unique birthday gift, stocking filler, or reward toy? The Stretcherz Play Case is a hit with kids who love action figures, fidget toys, and squishy collectibles. With its fun design, sensory appeal, and endless stretchiness, it’s a gift that’s guaranteed to be played with again and again.
